prompt: Create a dark fantasy cinematic illustration of a massive muscular blacksmith in a medieval forge, shown from the waist up in a vertical composition. The blacksmith is a rugged bearded man with long messy dark brown hair tied back, wearing heavy worn leather armor, thick gloves, straps, metal rivets, and a pendant, but place a large opaque dark brown square censor block directly over the center of his face. He grips a huge engraved hammer in his left hand and tongs in his right, striking a glowing red-orange molten metal blade or ingot on a heavy black anvil. At the impact point, create an explosive burst of orange sparks mixed with vivid blue-purple electric arcs crawling across the hot metal, giving the scene a rock-and-roll magical forge energy. The background is a cluttered stone-and-timber smithy with exactly 1 blazing furnace arch on the left, hanging chains above, tools and banners on the walls, and a crate of coal on the right. Use dramatic warm firelight, deep shadows, gritty textures, soot, embers floating through the air, high detail, painterly realism, epic fantasy concept art, strong contrast, volumetric glow, and a vertical 2:3 poster framing. Add a small elegant signature and date in the bottom-right corner reading June 9, 2026 and Oyagi. No other readable text.
